pi_items.source: wazuh_env docker-compose script (setup_wazuh.sh) confirms only the wazuh.manager, wazuh.indexer, and wazuh.dashboard containers are deployed, with no separate agent nodes, meaning the manager (agent 000) is the sole active agent.
The task description and setup_task.sh explicitly require navigating to and interacting with the Configuration Assessment module (under Endpoint Security), not an Agents module.

privileged_info_summary: The Wazuh environment is deployed as a single node without external agent containers, confirming that the manager itself (agent 000) is the only active agent. The task involves interacting with real CIS Benchmark compliance data for the Ubuntu container. The expected module to interact with is Configuration Assessment, contradicting the metadata claim of Agents.
